payload.answer: Extracted two experiment runs: PPO-001 (baseline) with reward 12 and Sharpe 45; PPO-002 (entropy tuned) with reward 18 and Sharpe 51.

entity_resolution.reason: All entities are explicitly defined in the input table and require no resolution.

memory_cards.statement: PPO-001 achieved a reward of 12 and a Sharpe ratio of 45, serving as the baseline configuration.
PPO-002 achieved a reward of 18 and a Sharpe ratio of 51, with entropy tuning applied.

details: Leading zeros in numeric values interpreted as decimal integers (e.g., '012' → 12).
Memory cards created for each run with correct metric assignments.
